title: JavaScript Falsy Value Example
description: A minimal public quiz example that shows the simplest single-choice contribution path with explanation-first feedback.

questions.title: Which value is falsy in JavaScript?
questions.description: Choose the value that becomes false in a boolean context without any conversion helper.
questions.explanation: `0` is one of JavaScript's built-in falsy values. Arrays, objects, and non-empty strings are all truthy, so this question teaches learners to separate literal appearance from boolean behavior.
